items.title: It's a great day to be Ron Harper Jr.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
It's a great day to be Ron Harper Jr.

Since his days at Rutgers, he has transformed his body so that his game could evolve. That, coupled with a healthy shoulder, led to a breakout year.

1/2

NEW: At 26 years old, Ron Harper Jr had never secured a long-term NBA contract.

That changed today. It was a long, long journey:

items.title: Ron Harper Jr. inks a 3-year, $9 million deal to remain with the Celtics, per Shams.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Ron Harper Jr. inks a 3-year, $9 million deal to remain with the Celtics, per Shams.

He returned to the Org. last year. After winning 2-way roster spot, he fit in seamlessly in his opportunities w/ the parent club.

That earned him a standard contract & paved the way for this multi-year agreement.

items.title: [Charania] Boston Celtics G/F Ron Harper Jr. intends to sign a new three-year, $9 million deal to return to the franchise, sources tell ESPN. The Celtics are declining Harper's $2.6M team option, clearing the way for the sides to commit on a longer deal.
items.author: MembershipSingle7137
items.body_excerpt: [Charania] Boston Celtics G/F Ron Harper Jr. intends to sign a new three-year, $9 million deal to return to the franchise, sources tell ESPN. The Celtics are declining Harper's $2.6M team option, clearing the way for the sides to commit on a longer deal. Harper has gone from a…
